name: Easy Spicy Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine ground beef and pork.
2. Cut the green bell pepper and onion into small chunks.
3. Add the chopped vegetables to the meat mixture.
4. Mix the meat loaf mix according to package directions.
5. Add the meat loaf mix to the mixture and mix well.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Place half of the mixture into a 9 x 12-inch roasting pan.
8. Open the can of jalapeno peppers and remove the seeds.
9. Arrange 3 large jalapeno peppers on top of the meat mixture in the pan.
10. Cover with thin slices of Monterey Jack cheese.
11. Cover with the remaining meat loaf mix.
12. Bake for 1 1/2 hours.
13. Fifteen (15) minutes before the meat loaf is done, pour the spicy tomato sauce over the top.
14. Serve with mashed potatoes, gravy, and a green salad. Enjoy with homemade bread.
